base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of psi_spells_atlas — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1994 earthbound. All PSI spell VFX — Fire α/β/γ/Ω, Freeze α/β/γ/Ω, Thunder α/β/γ/Ω, Rockin α/β/γ/Ω, Flash, Starstorm, Shield, Brainshock, Defense Down, + Shield Killer + Counter Unit. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: All PSI spell VFX — Fire α/β/γ/Ω, Freeze α/β/γ/Ω, Thunder α/β/γ/Ω, Rockin α/β/γ/Ω, Flash, Starstorm, Shield, Brainshock, Defense Down, + Shield Killer + Counter Unit
